{"credits": [{"type": "finder", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/63862323?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/cherez0ff/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/cherez0ff/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/cherez0ff/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/cherez0ff/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/cherez0ff", "id": 63862323, "login": "cherez0ff", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjYzODYyMzIz", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/cherez0ff/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/cherez0ff/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/cherez0ff/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/cherez0ff/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/cherez0ff/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/cherez0ff", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-11769", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:N/SC:H/SI:H/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-22", "name": "Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-200", "name": "Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor"}], "description": "We have released version 5.24.0 of the Grafana Operator. This patch includes a MODERATE severity security fix for a path traversal/privilege escalation vulnerability in the Grafana Operator.


### Summary

The Grafana Operator supports loading dashboards & library panels using the jsonnet data templating language. The jsonnet expression is evaluated in the context of the operator manager pod.
### Impact

It is possible for a malicious user who can create `Dashboard` or `LibraryPanel` resources for a `Grafana` instance to obtain the Kubernetes service account token of the Grafana Operator manager.

### Affected versions

All Grafana Operator versions <= 5.23

### Solutions and mitigations

All installations should be upgraded as soon as possible.

As a workaround, the following ValidatingAdmissionPolicy prevent the creation or modification of jsonnet based resources:
```
apiVersion: admissionregistration.k8s.io/v1
kind: ValidatingAdmissionPolicy
metadata:
  name: "prevent-jsonnet-dashboards"
spec:
  failurePolicy: Fail
  matchConstraints:
    resourceRules:
      - apiGroups: ["grafana.integreatly.org"]
        apiVersions: ["v1beta1"]
        operations: ["CREATE", "UPDATE"]
        resources: ["grafanadashboards", "grafanalibrarypanels"]
  validations:
    - expression: "!has(object.spec.jsonnetLib)"
---
apiVersion: admissionregistration.k8s.io/v1
kind: ValidatingAdmissionPolicyBinding
metadata:
  name: "prevent-jsonnet-dashboards-clusterwide"
spec:
  policyName: "prevent-jsonnet-dashboards"
  validationActions: [Deny]
```


### Acknowledgement

We would like to thank [Artem Cherezov](https://github.com/cherez0ff) for responsibly disclosing the vulnerability.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00361, "percentile": 0.28092}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-fcw4-wwqm-m8cf", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-19T20:51:16Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fcw4-wwqm-m8cf", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-fcw4-wwqm-m8cf"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-11769"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-19T20:51:16Z", "references": ["https://github.com/grafana/grafana-operator/security/advisories/GHSA-fcw4-wwqm-m8cf", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-11769", "https://grafana.com/security/security-advisories/cve-2026-11769", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fcw4-wwqm-m8cf"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/grafana/grafana-operator/security-advisories/GHSA-fcw4-wwqm-m8cf", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/grafana/grafana-operator", "summary": "Grafana Operator: Privilege escalation from namespace admin to cluster admin via GrafanaDashboard jsonnetLib fileName", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-19T20:51:17Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-fcw4-wwqm-m8cf", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "5.24.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/grafana/grafana-operator/v5"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 5.23.0"}, {"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/grafana/grafana-operator"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2.0.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Grafana Operator: Privilege escalation from namespace admin to cluster admin via GrafanaDashboard jsonnetLib fileName
